name: Blake Belladonna
description:
Blake Belladonna is a first year student at Beacon Academy and was a member of the White Fang before she left. She is a member of team RWBY.

Blake is a fair-skinned young woman with wavy black hair and amber eyes. Her Faunus trait is a pair of black cat ears on top of her head. A black ribbon is tied with a large bow on the top of her head, with her cat ears hidden inside the loops. She wears purple eye shadow in cats eye style.
creator: KiraTakamiya
